Software engineer working across product development, tooling and backend systems.

Most of my work revolves around building and maintaining production software, internal tooling and developer workflows — ranging from frontend systems and product interfaces to backend infrastructure and deployment tooling.

A lot of the public repositories here are related to tooling, abstractions and workflow improvements for live online environments.
